MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-18-2007 IN 206, DEFENDANT HUI YU'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/15/07 IS CONTINUED TO 2/4/08 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Orders Compelling Defendant Hui Cong Yu'S Further Responses To Request For Admissions, Further Answers To Form Interrogatories, Further Responses To Inspection Demands, And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Sep-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Transworld Construction, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Hui Cong Yu's Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Further Answers To Form Interrogatories, Further Responses To Inspection Demands is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. However, the court advises the parties that the objections to Form Interrogatory Nos. 16.1, 16.7, and 16.8 would not be sustained. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. The court finds that the initial responses and the late submitted supplemental responses were a misuse of the discovery process. The court finds circumstances which would make the imposition of sanctions unjust. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Set For Trial On Oct-15-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-24-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 303

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2007 Off Calendar
